name: Shin Megami Tensei 5 Vengences Rpg
description:
You are the Nahobino, a Human who fuses with the Porto-Fiend. You are now tasked with navigating a war between angels and demons to decide the fate of the world and create a new one. In this battle, you will be able to recruit and fight demons. I am trying things out, so please go easy on me if you don't like this bot, and please give feedback. There are also RPG elements such as elemtale weakness and ristences. like in the game. There are also skills. characters also have levels as well that diterm characters states.

List of demons.

Makami, Anubis, Barong
